name: Artisan ATN326 Power Loomed Area Rug Brown / Brown 5'-1" X 7'-6" - Safavieh.
description: Introducing our captivating medium rectangle area rug, impeccably designed to enrich your living space with its timeless elegance. Measuring a comfortable 5'-1" X 7'-6" and boasting a low-profile height of 1/8", this exquisite piece artfully blends traditional sophistication with modern craftsmanship.Crafted using a power-loomed technique, this rug exhibits a durable polypropylene pile that stands the test of time, all while maintaining the sumptuous feel underfoot. The mesmerizing brown-on-brown color palette exudes warmth and versatility, making it an impeccable choice for a wide range of interior decors.The rug's intricate pattern, as observed in the image, showcases an elaborate display of florals, medallions, and filigree motifs that are inspired by classic Oriental designs. These elements come together to create a harmonious visual feast, gracing your floors with an air of opulence and grandeur that only a rug of this caliber can provide.Proudly made in Turkey, a region renowned for its rich heritage in rug-making, you are guaranteed a product of exceptional quality and design precision. Moreover, our rug is OEKO-TEX certified, ensuring that it is free from harmful substances and safe for use in your home environment.Invite the allure of fine Turkish craftsmanship to your home with this stunning area rug, a testament to refined taste and a promise of enduring beauty and comfort. Care Instructions: Vacuum Without Beater Bar
